fields.name: bin
fields.description: UCSC bin value for chromosome range queries.

fields.name: milliDiv
fields.description: Base mismatches in parts per thousand.

fields.name: milliDel
fields.description: Deleted bases in parts per thousand.

fields.name: milliIns
fields.description: Inserted bases in parts per thousand.

fields.name: genoEnd
fields.description: 0-based half-open end in the genomic sequence.

fields.name: genoLeft
fields.description: Negative bases remaining after the genomic match.

fields.name: repStart
fields.description: Start in repeat consensus, or negative bases after match on reverse strand.

fields.name: repLeft
fields.description: Negative bases after match, or consensus start on reverse strand.

fields.name: id
fields.description: First digit of RepeatMasker .out id; UCSC advises it is best ignored.

index_recommendations.label: Primary interval lookup
index_recommendations.storage: per-assembly sidecar with chrom -> sorted intervals, optionally retaining UCSC bin levels
index_recommendations.query_pattern: Return repeats overlapping one extracted genomic window.
notes: This should be the first implemented index because GENtle region/gene extraction asks chromosome-range questions.
Keep coordinates in UCSC 0-based half-open form internally and convert only at feature materialization boundaries.
A compact per-chromosome sorted Vec plus binary search is sufficient for local windows; add the UCSC bin column as a coarse prefilter when chromosome rows become large.

index_recommendations.label: Class/family display partition
index_recommendations.storage: secondary dictionary keyed by normalized repClass and repFamily to row offsets
index_recommendations.query_pattern: Filter or summarize SINE/LINE/LTR/DNA/simple-repeat families without scanning all rows.
notes: Normalize uncertain suffixes such as 'DNA?' for grouping while preserving original strings in qualifiers.
This index feeds feature-tree grouping, legends, and future repeat-density summaries.

index_recommendations.label: Repeat-name lookup
index_recommendations.storage: dictionary keyed by repName to row offsets and class/family metadata
index_recommendations.query_pattern: Find all AluY/L1PA2/etc. intervals or build name-specific statistics.
notes: Useful for expert panels and for matching external repeat-family annotations to local genomic intervals.
Do not make this the only index; name lookup is secondary to region-window lookup in GENtle's current workflows.

index_recommendations.label: Display-quality metric columns
index_recommendations.storage: columnar sidecar for swScore, milliDiv, milliDel, milliIns keyed by row offset
index_recommendations.query_pattern: Shade repeat features or summarize repeat-divergence quality after interval lookup.
notes: Keep metrics separate from geometry so small region imports do not need to deserialize the entire raw row payload.
UCSC uses mismatch/deletion/insertion values for display shading; GENtle can later mirror that without changing the primary interval index.
